creator: anders@fix.no
text:
On Fri, Jun 22, 2001 at 12:06:00AM +0200, leifn@neland.dk wrote:
> After adding these lines to /etc/pam.conf
> 
> imap    auth            required        pam_unix.so     try_first_pass
> imap    account         required        pam_unix.so     try_first_pass
> imap    session         required        pam_unix.so     try_first_pass
> imap    password        required        pam_unix.so     try_first_pass
> 
> I get these errors-

You get what errors?

> Without these lines I get approx "imapd: PAM No modules loaded for imap service"

Yes, you are told to set up auth, account and session management when
installing the port. This is in the pkg-message for imap-uw. Did you
initially configure PAM without it?

Cheers,

-- 
Anders.
